title: Geon Definition
description: What is the meaning of the term “geon”?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear definition of the word “geon.” Relevant documents are those that explain the concept, whether it is the psychological notion of simple geometric components of visual objects (e.g., cones, cylinders, spheres) used in object recognition theory, or the Materials Science/MeSH definition referring to a polyvinyl resin used in plastics. Any source that provides a concise, authoritative definition of “geon” in these contexts satisfies the need; unrelated topics such as finance, grammar, or generic term‑definition request forms are not relevant.

title: Pareto Chart Definition
description: What is a Pareto chart in statistics and how is it used?

Relevant documents should explain how the chart differs from a histogram, illustrate its use in quality and defect analysis, and provide basic guidance on interpreting the chart.

title: Whitening Clothes

title: Geologic Nonconformity

Relevant documents should explain that a nonconformity is an unconformity separating sedimentary rocks from older non‑sedimentary (igneous/metamorphic) rocks, typically indicating a period of erosion before deposition.
